task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Authenticated Todo API** (Level 5)

Build a Todo API that requires JWT authentication. POST /api/register creates a user (email, password). POST /api/login returns a token. All /api/todos endpoints require auth. Users can only see their own todos.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done
  user_id, required

# Your endpoints here

```
final_source:
/*
ARCHITECTURE:
Authenticated Todo API with JWT

в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    POST /api/register    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Client   в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ>   в”Ӯ Backend  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ POST /api/login          в”Ӯ(Express) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ GET /api/todos (+ auth)  в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ POST /api/todos (+ auth) в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ <в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ  в”Ӯ          в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    user/token/todos      в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                                            в”Ӯ
                                            v
                                        в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
                                        в”Ӯ  SQLiteв”Ӯ
                                        в”Ӯ(Users, в”Ӯ
                                        в”Ӯ Todos) в”Ӯ
                                        в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
*/

build for javascript backend
database is local memory

owner is 'admin@example.com'
allow signup and login

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required

create a Todos table:
  title, required
  done, default false
  user_id, required

when user calls POST /api/register sending data:
  rate limit 10 per minute
  validate data:
    email must not be empty
    password must not be empty
  user = save data to Users
  send back user with status 201

when user calls POST /api/login sending data:
  rate limit 10 per minute
  validate data:
    email must not be empty
    password must not be empty
  user = look up User where email is data's email
  if user is empty:
    send back 'invalid credentials' with status 401
  if user's password is not data's password:
    send back 'invalid credentials' with status 401
  token is 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9'
  send back { token is token } with status 200

when user calls GET /api/todos:
  requires login
  todos = get all Todos where user_id is current_user's id
  send back todos

when user calls POST /api/todos sending data:
  requires login
  data's user_id = current_user's id
  todo = save data to Todos
  send back todo with status 201
